persona_intro.headline: Pick the student profile that fits you
persona_intro.body: Your student profile helps shape the suggestions you see. You can change it at any time using this menu.

first_intention.headline: Start with something you want to work towards
first_intention.body: Add an intention like "Get lab experience" or "Explore digital law". We will help you break it into concrete steps.

steps_and_suggestions.headline: We are generating steps for this intention
steps_and_suggestions.body: You will see suggested steps appear here. You can accept, edit, or reject them, and you can always add your own steps as well.

opportunities_intro.headline: Here are ways to move this step forward
opportunities_intro.body: These are simulated King's Edge style and independent opportunities that match this step. You can scan them for ideas and adapt them to your situation.

opportunities_shuffle.headline: Shuffle to see different ideas
opportunities_shuffle.body: If these suggestions do not feel quite right, you can shuffle to see another set of opportunities for this step.
